notes.en: Mono [[element:cryo]] [[character:ganyu]] teams utilize **[[set:blizzard-strayer]] (4)** and [[element:cryo]] Resonance while having [[character:ganyu]] on field dealing damage through both her [[ability:ca]]s and [[ability:burst]].
notes.fr: Les équipes Mono [[element:cryo]] de [[character:ganyu]] utilisent **[[set:blizzard-strayer]] (4)** et la résonance [[element:cryo]], tout en gardant [[character:ganyu]] on-field pour infliger des dégâts avec ses [[ability:ca]]s et son [[ability:burst]].
notes.it: I team Mono [[element:cryo]] sfruttano il set **[[set:blizzard-strayer]] (4)** e la Risonanza [[element:cryo]] con [[character:ganyu]] in campo, infliggendo danni sia con i suoi [[ability:ca|Attacchi Caricati]] che con il suo [[ability:burst]].

notes.en: When using **[[set:blizzard-strayer]] (4)**, [[character:ganyu]] reaches max [[stat:cr]] with a base of 45% on her [[ability:ca]]s and a base of 65% on her [[ability:burst]]. Anything between 45% and 55% [[stat:cr]] is a nice point to be at without sacrificing too much damage on either end.
notes.fr: Avec **[[set:blizzard-strayer]] (4)**, [[character:ganyu]] atteint le [[stat:cr]] maximal avec une base de 45% sur ses attaques chargées et une base de 65% sur son [[ability:burst]]. Entre 45% et 55% de [[stat:cr]] est un bon point d'équilibre sans trop sacrifier de dégâts d'un côté ou de l'autre.
notes.it: Con **[[set:blizzard-strayer]] (4)**, [[character:ganyu]] raggiunge il [[stat:cr]] massimo a 45% per gli [[ability:ca|Attacchi Caricati]] e a 65% per il [[ability:burst]]. Qualsiasi valore compreso tra il 45% e il 55% di [[stat:cr]] è un buon punto di equilibrio senza sacrificare troppo danno su entrambi i fronti.
